consistency_inspector.summary: No factual mismatches found across live server UI_ACTION_ALLOWLIST, command adapter ALLOWLIST, tests, screen passports, render surface registry, API Connections registry, and final E2E matrix. Browser payload rejection, disabled adapter-only launch_client, route create/update/draft not-admitted state, and non-mutating API profile/evidence surfaces are consistent.

final_staged_audit.blocker: readiness packet left recommendation as PENDING_INDEPENDENT_STAGED_AUDIT instead of emitting the limited owner-review recommendation
final_staged_audit.resolution: readiness packet now recommends only WEB_UI_READY_FOR_DESKTOP_ADMISSION_REVIEW and STOP_FOR_OWNER_APPROVAL, with owner approval still required before desktop
final_staged_audit.final_reaudit_summary: Staged paths are limited to audit_results/ui_web_pre_desktop_freeze_*; readiness packet recommends only owner-review readiness and stop-for-owner-approval; non-claims remain listed only under does_not_claim; closeout includes Contour Capsule and resume from here.
required_checks: no staged files outside audit_results/ui_web_pre_desktop_freeze_* unless a justified XS test assertion is needed
no new UI action or backend command surface
action registry, passports, live server, adapter, and tests agree
API route remove remains disabled-only registry cleanup
closeout contains Contour Capsule and resume from here
